svg.title: MLOps pipeline diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how train.py, evaluate.py, register_model.py, and GitHub Actions connect in sequence, with MLflow tracking all runs and a threshold gate blocking weak models.

g.text: logs params, accuracy, F1, and model artifact
finds best run by F1 score

svg.text: all 3 strong runs score F1 = 1.0 and pass — weak run scores F1 ≈ 0.72 and is blocked
CI pipeline runs this flow automatically on every merge to main
MLflow tracks every run — compare parameters and metrics in the UI at localhost:5000
